compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
ROOT CAUSE PROVEN (joe-debug). Mechanism: produce_code_review_verdict (src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py) builds runner_sel from the pre-snapshot cfg for the early preflight, then REUSES it after gate_source.apply_handle re-roots cfg onto the materialized ticket-store clone. get_runner(cfg, override=runner_sel) returns the override VERBATIM (runner.py) and PydanticAIRunner.run reads its OWN baked-in self._config (runner.py:187,222-223) -> the agent's rebar_tools got cfg.tickets_path=None -> fell back to repo_path (bare clone) -> _ids._scan_alias errored 'cannot list <clone>/.tickets-tracker' -> review aborted, no LLM-Review. Introduced by e7a96025a (attested four-pass gate); shipped in the 01:38 deploy of 151c2b69 -> reviews <=255 (older build) fine, 256+ dead. The 1fb66466d rebar.llm reorg was a RED HERRING (touched none of the ticket-wiring files). Plan-review/completion unaffected: operations.py builds its runner AFTER apply_handle.

PROOF (RED->GREEN with teeth): new regression test tests/unit/test_code_review_gate_session.py::test_code_review_gate_runner_is_rebuilt_from_rerooted_ticket_store asserts the runner ACTUALLY used (agent_runner._runner._config.tickets_path) carries the re-rooted store, on the PRODUCTION path (runner=None). Confirmed RED first (runner_tickets=None != materialized root — the exact bug), GREEN after fix, and MUTATION-CHECKED (neutralizing the rebuild returns it to RED). FIX: rebuild runner_sel = runner or get_runner(cfg) AFTER apply_handle (production path only; injected test runner preserved). lint+typecheck+91 related tests green. Landing as Gerrit change 264 (LLM-Review self-cast admin-override since the broken bot can't review its own unblock; awaiting Verified/CI). Step 6 replication = observe bot casting LLM-Review after the box auto-deploys the fix.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FIX LANDED: Gerrit change 264 (fix(review-bot): rebuild the code-review runner from the re-rooted cfg) SUBMITTED -> MERGED to main. Both SRs SATISFIED (Verified from CI + LLM-Review admin-override). Box i-00880b2c7f13527c5 auto-deploys within ~2-3min. Verifying bot recovery (joe-debug Step 6 replication) next: push a fresh change, confirm rebar review bot casts LLM-Review again.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: RESOLVED (joe-debug Step 6 replication PASS). After the fix auto-deployed, the rebar review bot cast LLM-Review+1 on open change 265 within ~80s; bot logs show the .tickets-tracker error GONE (remaining 409s are just stale backlog changes closed during the outage). Original report — 'bot casts no LLM-Review, fails with missing .tickets-tracker' — no longer reproduces. Two-vote gate fully restored for all agents.

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Push any change for review to Gerrit after the ~2026-07-04T01:38Z auto-deploy of main@151c2b69 onto box i-00880b2c7f13527c5.
2. Observe the review bot posts NO LLM-Review vote.

## Expected vs Actual
- **Expected**: rebar review bot casts LLM-Review on every open change.
- **Actual**: NO LLM-Review on changes 256+ (system-wide; all agents). Container serves /health 200 but every review fails internally with `Error: cannot list '/tmp/reviewbot-<x>/.tickets-tracker'`.

## Root cause (PROVEN)
produce_code_review_verdict (src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py) reused the pre-snapshot runner after gate_source.apply_handle re-rooted cfg onto the materialized ticket-store clone. get_runner(cfg, override=) returns the override verbatim and PydanticAIRunner.run reads its OWN baked-in self._config -> the agent's rebar tools ran against the bare clone (tickets_path None -> repo_path) -> missing .tickets-tracker -> review aborts, no vote. Introduced by e7a96025a.

## Fix
Change 264: rebuild runner_sel from the re-rooted cfg after apply_handle. RED->GREEN regression test with mutation-check teeth.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Root cause pinned to the exact commit + code path (e7a96025a; gate_dispatch.py runner reuse)
- [x] Fix lands on main; review bot resumes casting LLM-Review on new changes (verified: change 265 got LLM-Review+1 post-deploy)
- [x] Regression test that is RED before the fix and GREEN after (tests/unit/test_code_review_gate_session.py::test_code_review_gate_runner_is_rebuilt_from_rerooted_ticket_store)

## Follow-up (spun out, not part of this fix)
- Functional readiness probe so ADR-0026 auto-rollback catches review-path failures -> task smoky-biome-queue (discovered_from this bug). The /health-only gate is a pre-existing defense-in-depth gap, not this regression.
compiled_state.title: Review-bot casts no LLM-Review — reviews fail with missing .tickets-tracker (post main@151c2b69 rebar.llm refactor)
